# WorkSmart AI Assistant

> AI-powered workplace productivity platform: email generator, task planner, and workplace chatbot in one dashboard.

## Pages
- [Dashboard](/): Productivity overview, quick actions, and AI insights
- [Smart Email Generator](/email): Generate professional emails in any tone
- [AI Task Planner](/planner): Turn task lists into prioritized daily or weekly schedules
- [AI Chatbot](/chat): Conversational workplace assistant
- [Analytics](/analytics): Productivity and AI usage trends
- [Help Center](/help): How to use each module
